name: Morichika
overview: A corpse of an aspiring model was found under a Bridge. Police officer Shakil investigates the case whether it is a suicide case or murder. And he unveils some dark secrets that no one has imagined!

trailers.title: Morichika | Trailer | A CHORKI Original Series| Nisho | Siam | Mahi | Jovan | Shihab Shaheen
